import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, str\(__import__\(''pathlib''\).Path.home\(\) / ''.claude/extensions/MCP/analyze/src''\)\)
from analyzers.indexer import PHPIndexer
from pathlib import Path

indexer = PHPIndexer\(Path\(''.''\)\)
indexer.build_indexes\(\)

# Test Fix 1: get_entity
print\(''\\n=== TEST FIX 1: get_entity fields ===''\)
for name, entity in indexer.entities.items\(\):
    fields_info = [\(f[''name''], f[''type'']\) for f in entity.fields]
    if fields_info:
        print\(f''{name}: {fields_info[:5]}''\)

# Test Fix 3: routes YAML
print\(''\\n=== TEST FIX 3: routes YAML ===''\)
for r in indexer.routes[:15]:
    print\(f''{r.name}: {r.methods} {r.path} -> {r.controller}::{r.action}''\)
")

Bash(python -c "
import sys, asyncio
sys.path.insert\(0, str\(__import__\(''pathlib''\).Path.home\(\) / ''.claude/extensions/MCP/analyze/src''\)\)
from analyzers.indexer import PHPIndexer
from pathlib import Path

async def main\(\):
    indexer = PHPIndexer\(Path\(''.''\)\)
    await indexer.build_indexes\(\)

    # Test Fix 1: get_entity fields
    print\(''\\n=== TEST FIX 1: get_entity fields ===''\)
    for name, entity in indexer.entities.items\(\):
        fields_info = [\(f[''name''], f[''type'']\) for f in entity.fields]
        print\(f''{name}: {fields_info[:5]}''\)

    # Test Fix 3: routes YAML
    print\(''\\n=== TEST FIX 3: routes YAML ===''\)
    for r in indexer.routes[:15]:
        print\(f''{r.name}: {r.methods} {r.path} -> {r.controller}::{r.action}''\)

    print\(f''\\nTotal: {len\(indexer.entities\)} entities, {len\(indexer.routes\)} routes''\)

asyncio.run\(main\(\)\)
")
